---
title: Festival du Merveilleux
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061318/festivalmerveilleuxNB_d9ootj.png
description: Festival du Merveilleux, Musée des Arts Forains, Paris
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2026-01-01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061318/festivalmerveilleuxNB_d9ootj.png)
